title: My Little Monster
description:
Shizuku Mizutani is a hardworking high school girl who cares only about studying and achieving good grades. Her quiet and predictable life changes when she is asked to deliver class notes to Haru Yoshida, a troublemaker feared by other students because of his violent behavior and strange personality. Despite his intimidating reputation, Haru quickly becomes attached to Shizuku and openly expresses his feelings for her, leaving her confused and unsure how to respond.

As the two spend more time together, Shizuku slowly begins discovering emotions and relationships she had previously ignored in favor of academics. Alongside their friends and classmates, they experience awkward romantic moments, misunderstandings, personal growth, and the challenges of understanding one another. Combining romance, comedy, and heartfelt school drama, My Little Monster tells a charming story about friendship, love, and learning how to connect with others.
